description_long: This is a male construction worker dressed in a red collared shirt with rolled-up sleeves and black overalls, equipped for manual labor. He wears a bright orange safety helmet and sturdy black work boots, emphasizing his role in a hazardous environment. His right arm is fitted with a large brown work glove, and a tool belt with pouches and a coiled rope is strapped around his waist, ready for carrying tools and equipment. The figure's build is robust, with muscular arms and a confident stance, suggesting physical strength and readiness for demanding tasks. The left arm is bare, displaying a patch with a star insignia, adding a touch of character and detail. The overall appearance is practical, functional, and typical of a worker found on urban construction sites.
description: A robust male construction worker in a red shirt, black overalls, orange safety helmet, and work boots, equipped with a tool belt and glove.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red shirt, black overalls, orange helmet, tool belt, and brown glove on the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the helmet profile, tool belt, glove, and star insignia on the sleeve.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the crossed overall straps, tool belt with coiled rope, and back of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the glove, tool belt, and the figure's facial profile.
